title: Add inline class editing capabilities to UML canvas
description: The UML class diagram is read-only (LLDModule.tsx:1243-1466, LLDProperties). Users see class details but cannot edit anything — no input fields, no edit buttons exist. Properties panel renders attribute names/types/visibility as plain text. Implement: double-click class name to rename, '+' buttons to add attribute/method, '-' to remove, dropdowns for visibility/type changes. Wire to existing class-diagram-model.ts CRUD functions (addClass, updateClass, addAttribute, removeAttribute, etc.) which are fully built at class-diagram-model.ts:36-223 but currently unused.
acceptanceCriteria: Double-clicking a class name opens inline text input for renaming
Properties panel shows + button to add new attribute or method to selected class
Each attribute/method has a delete (x) button
Visibility can be changed via dropdown (+, -, #, ~) per attribute/method
Stereotype can be changed via dropdown (class, interface, abstract, enum)
Changes update the canvas SVG and GeneratedCodePanel in real-time
class-diagram-model.ts updateClass/addAttribute/removeAttribute/addMethod/removeMethod are used for mutations

title: Add relationship creation UI between classes on canvas
description: No relationship creation exists (LLDModule.tsx:240-534). UMLClassBox only has onSelect and onDrag handlers (line 243-246). No connection handles, no click-to-connect UI. Only pre-defined relationships from patterns/problems/code-parsing render. Implement: show connection handle dots on class edges on hover, click-drag from handle to target class, show relationship type picker dropdown (inheritance, realization, composition, aggregation, association, dependency) matching existing SVG markers in RelationshipDefs (line 156-236).
acceptanceCriteria: Hovering a class shows 4 connection handle dots (top, bottom, left, right)
Clicking and dragging from a handle shows a preview line following cursor
Dropping on another class opens a relationship type picker
New relationship renders with correct SVG marker per type
Relationship label and cardinality can be set in picker or properties panel
GeneratedCodePanel updates to reflect new relationships

title: Add delete functionality for classes and relationships
description: No delete exists (LLDModule.tsx:3200-3464). No handleDeleteClass, no handleDeleteRelationship, no onKeyDown for Delete key. Only clearAllModes() at line 3221 wipes everything. Implement: (1) Delete/Backspace key removes selected class + connected relationships, (2) Delete button in properties panel, (3) Hover 'x' on relationship edges. Use removeClass/removeRelationship from class-diagram-model.ts.
acceptanceCriteria: Pressing Delete/Backspace with a class selected removes it and all connected relationships
Delete button appears in properties panel for selected class
Hovering a relationship edge shows a delete indicator; clicking removes it
GeneratedCodePanel updates after deletion
Canvas re-renders correctly with remaining elements

title: Replace 50+ hardcoded hex colors with CSS custom properties in LLDModule
description: LLDModule.tsx uses hardcoded hex in SVG fill/stroke: #1e1e2e (line 334), #e2e8f0 (line 375), #94a3b8 (line 400), #9ca3af (line 169), #6b7280 (line 486), #60a5fa (line 335), #c4b5fd (line 427), #64748b (line 404). Also STEREOTYPE_BORDER_COLOR (lines 74-78), PRINCIPLE_COLORS (lines 645-650), DIFFICULTY_COLORS (lines 709-714). Meanwhile, PatternBehavioralSimulator.tsx already uses var(--primary), var(--foreground), var(--gray-3) etc. Align the main module to the same CSS variable approach.
acceptanceCriteria: No hardcoded hex colors remain in SVG fill/stroke attributes in LLDModule.tsx
All colors use CSS custom properties matching the platform's theme system
STEREOTYPE_BORDER_COLOR, PRINCIPLE_COLORS, DIFFICULTY_COLORS use CSS variables
Visual appearance unchanged in default dark theme
Colors update correctly if platform theme changes

title: Add zoom/pan controls to all 3 SVG canvases
description: All 3 SVG canvases lack zoom/pan: LLDCanvas (line 1194), SequenceDiagramCanvas (line 1993), StateMachineCanvas (line 2712). Currently use viewBox with overflow-auto on parent div. No onWheel zoom, no background drag-to-pan. Implement: (1) scroll-wheel zoom centered on cursor, (2) drag-on-background pan, (3) zoom toolbar (zoom in/out, fit-to-view, reset percentage), (4) SVG viewBox or CSS transform manipulation.
acceptanceCriteria: Scroll wheel zooms in/out centered on cursor position
Click-and-drag on background pans the view
Zoom toolbar with +, -, fit-to-view, and 100% reset buttons
Zoom level percentage displayed (e.g., '150%')
Works on all 3 canvas types
Class dragging still works correctly when zoomed/panned

title: Add 15 missing LLD problem starter diagrams to match SEO data
description: lld-problems-data.ts defines 25 SEO problem pages but problems.ts only has 10 starter diagrams. Missing 15: movie-ticket-booking, restaurant-management, airline-booking, tic-tac-toe, card-game, notification-service, logging-framework, cache-system, task-scheduler, pub-sub-system, rate-limiter, url-shortener, social-media-feed, spreadsheet, stock-exchange, music-streaming. Each needs starterClasses (3-5 UML classes with attributes/methods), starterRelationships, requirements (4-5), and hints (3).
acceptanceCriteria: problems.ts exports 25 LLD problems matching all SEO slugs
Each new problem has 3-5 starter UML classes with realistic attributes and methods
Each has typed relationships (composition, inheritance, etc.)
Each has 4-5 functional requirements
Each has 3 progressive hints with design pattern suggestions
All 25 appear in ProblemsBrowser sidebar and load starter diagrams

title: Split LLDModule.tsx monolith into separate component files
description: LLDModule.tsx is 3463 lines containing 27+ memoized components. Split into: (1) lld/canvas/LLDCanvas.tsx (UMLClassBox, UMLEdge, RelationshipDefs, helpers), (2) lld/canvas/SequenceDiagramCanvas.tsx, (3) lld/canvas/StateMachineCanvas.tsx, (4) lld/sidebar/LLDSidebar.tsx + individual browsers, (5) lld/panels/LLDProperties.tsx + variants, (6) lld/panels/GeneratedCodePanel.tsx, (7) lld/panels/LLDBottomPanelTabs.tsx, (8) hooks/useLLDModule.ts. Keep shared constants in lld/constants.ts.
acceptanceCriteria: LLDModule.tsx reduced to under 200 lines (re-exports hook + barrel)
Each new file under 500 lines
All existing functionality works identically
No circular dependencies
All memo() wrappers preserved
Clean imports via barrel index

title: Fix clipboard copy to handle non-secure contexts
description: At LLDModule.tsx:2493, navigator.clipboard.writeText(code).then(() => { setCopied(true) }) has no .catch(). In HTTP contexts or with denied clipboard permission, this throws an unhandled promise rejection. Add catch handler with fallback (execCommand or error toast).
acceptanceCriteria: Copy button works in HTTPS context
Copy button shows error message in HTTP context (no unhandled rejection)
Error state shows brief message like 'Copy failed — use Ctrl+C'
No unhandled promise rejections in browser console

title: Fix circuit breaker open→half-open transition using step counter
description: At PatternBehavioralSimulator.tsx:180, the open→half-open transition uses `totalRequests % 5 === 0` which checks cumulative request count modulo. If totalRequests doesn't happen to be divisible by 5 during any step, the circuit stays open permanently. Replace with a step-counter-since-opened approach: track when circuit opened, transition to half-open after N steps.
acceptanceCriteria: Circuit breaker reliably transitions from open to half-open after configured cooldown steps
Half-open state allows probe requests through as designed
State machine visualization at line 378-404 correctly reflects all transitions
Works across all 3 scenarios (Normal, Degraded, Outage)

title: Fix 'Modern' pattern category starting collapsed in PatternBrowser
description: At LLDModule.tsx:547-550, PatternBrowser initializes expanded state as { creational: true, structural: true, behavioral: true } but omits 'modern'. The Repository pattern (the only modern pattern) starts hidden while all other categories start expanded. Add modern: true to initial state.
acceptanceCriteria: All 4 pattern categories start expanded on initial render
Repository pattern is visible without clicking to expand
Collapse/expand toggle still works for all categories

title: Add undo/redo system for diagram editing
description: No undo/redo exists (LLDModule.tsx:3200-3464). handleDragClass at line 3317 mutates position with no revert path. Implement: undo/redo stack capturing {classes, relationships} snapshots. Ctrl+Z to undo, Ctrl+Shift+Z to redo. Toolbar buttons. Limit to 50 entries. Reset stack on pattern/problem switch.
acceptanceCriteria: Ctrl+Z undoes last diagram change (drag, add, delete, edit)
Ctrl+Shift+Z or Ctrl+Y redoes
Undo/redo buttons appear in canvas toolbar
Stack limited to 50 entries
Switching patterns/problems resets undo stack

title: Remove orphaned canvas node/edge components (~840 lines dead code)
description: canvas/nodes/lld/ClassNode.tsx and canvas/edges/lld/*.tsx (6 edge types) are never imported by LLDModule.tsx (confirmed by grep). Only reference is from canvas/panels/ClassPropertiesPanel.tsx (line 28) which is itself never imported. LLDModule has its own inline UMLClassBox (line 249) and UMLEdge (line 448). Remove the orphaned files or, if migrating to React Flow later, mark them clearly as future-use.
acceptanceCriteria: canvas/nodes/lld/ directory removed or marked as future-use with clear comments
canvas/edges/lld/ directory removed or marked
canvas/panels/ClassPropertiesPanel.tsx removed if referencing only orphaned code
No broken imports after cleanup
All LLD module functionality unchanged

title: Add comprehensive ARIA attributes and keyboard navigation
description: LLDModule.tsx (3463 lines) has zero aria-label, aria-role, or aria-live attributes (verified by grep). SVG canvases at lines 1195, 1993, 2712 have no role='img' or aria-label. Interactive elements (UMLClassBox line 249, sequence messages line 2123, state nodes line 2828) have no tabIndex or onKeyDown handlers. Add: role/aria-label on canvases, tabIndex/onKeyDown on interactive elements, aria-live on properties panel, visible focus indicators.
acceptanceCriteria: SVG canvases have role='img' and aria-label describing the diagram
All interactive SVG elements have tabIndex and aria-label
Tab key navigates between canvas elements
Arrow keys navigate between classes/messages/states within canvas
Enter/Space activates focused element
Properties panel has aria-live='polite' for selection changes
Visible focus rings on all interactive elements

title: Add confirmation dialog on destructive context switches
description: handleSelectPattern (line 3234) calls clearAllModes() then overwrites classes/relationships. If user manually added classes from palette or dragged positions, work is silently lost. Same for handleSelectDemo (3242), handleSelectProblem (3264), handleSelectSequence (3271), handleSelectStateMachine (3276). Add dirty flag tracking user modifications; show confirmation dialog when switching while dirty.
acceptanceCriteria: Dirty flag set when user adds class, drags class, edits attribute/method
Switching patterns/problems/demos when dirty shows 'Discard changes?' dialog
Dialog offers 'Discard' and 'Cancel' options
Cancel keeps current diagram; Discard proceeds with switch
Switching when NOT dirty proceeds immediately

title: Add canvas entry animations for diagram elements
description: Classes and relationships at LLDModule.tsx:1220-1237 render instantly with no animation. PatternBehavioralSimulator and SequenceDiagramLatencyOverlay already use motion/react (imported at their line 4). Add: staggered fade-in + scale-up for classes on pattern load, edge draw-in animation, smooth morph on SOLID before/after toggle. Respect prefers-reduced-motion.
acceptanceCriteria: Classes fade in with staggered delay when loading a pattern
Relationships animate drawing from source to target
SOLID before/after toggle shows smooth transition
Animations complete within 300-500ms total
prefers-reduced-motion disables all animations

title: Optimize UMLEdge with Map lookup instead of linear search
description: At LLDModule.tsx:449-450, UMLEdge does classes.find(c => c.id === rel.source) per edge per render = O(C*R). Fix: in LLDCanvas, build Map<string, UMLClass> via useMemo, pass as prop to UMLEdge. Lookup becomes O(1).
acceptanceCriteria: UMLEdge receives classMap: Map<string, UMLClass> prop
Lookup is O(1) via classMap.get()
LLDCanvas creates Map once via useMemo([classes])
Visual rendering unchanged

title: Memoize layoutStateMachine computation in StateMachineCanvas
description: At LLDModule.tsx:2662, layoutStateMachine(data) is called in render body of StateMachineCanvas without useMemo. Recalculates grid layout on every render. Wrap in useMemo(() => layoutStateMachine(data), [data]).
acceptanceCriteria: layoutStateMachine wrapped in useMemo with [data] dependency
Layout recalculates only when data reference changes
Visual rendering unchanged

title: Add error boundary around LLD canvas components
description: No error boundary wraps any canvas. A rendering error in SVG (missing class ref in UMLEdge at line 449-451 returns null gracefully, but unexpected NaN coordinates or other errors would crash the module). Add ErrorBoundary around each canvas variant with 'Reset Diagram' recovery button.
acceptanceCriteria: Each canvas (LLDCanvas, SequenceDiagramCanvas, StateMachineCanvas) wrapped in error boundary
Rendering error shows fallback UI with 'Something went wrong' and Reset button
Reset calls clearAllModes() to restore clean state
Normal rendering unaffected

title: Redesign sidebar tabs for 7 modes without overflow
description: LLDModule.tsx:844-851 has 7 tabs ('Patterns', 'SOLID', 'Problems', 'Sequence', 'State Machine', 'Code', 'Palette') at text-[11px] with flex-1. 'State Machine' is 13 chars. On narrow sidebars (<400px), these overflow. Redesign: use icon-only tabs with tooltips, or a dropdown selector, or grouped categories.
acceptanceCriteria: All 7 modes accessible at sidebar widths down to 240px
No text truncation or overflow
Active mode clearly indicated
Mode labels readable (tooltips if icon-only)

title: Show class diagram legend even when no pattern is selected
description: At LLDModule.tsx:1172, the legend is inside {patternName && (...)}. When user adds classes from Palette without selecting a pattern, canvasTitle is null (line 3347), so legend doesn't appear. Fix: show legend whenever classes.length > 0, not just when patternName is truthy.
acceptanceCriteria: Legend showing stereotype colors visible whenever any classes are on canvas
Legend still shows pattern name when a pattern is selected
Legend hidden only when canvas is empty

title: Add sequence diagram message playback animation
description: Sequence diagram messages render statically. Add playback: (1) Play button animates messages appearing one by one in order, (2) Pause/resume, (3) Step forward/backward, (4) Speed control (0.5x, 1x, 2x), (5) Current message highlighted with glow. This makes sequence diagrams come alive for learning.
acceptanceCriteria: Play button starts messages appearing one by one with draw-in animation
Current message highlighted with glow/pulse effect
Pause/resume and step forward/backward controls work
Speed selector offers 0.5x, 1x, 2x
Playback auto-stops at last message

title: Add state machine step-through simulation
description: State machine canvas is static. Add interactive step-through: (1) 'Simulate' button highlights initial state, (2) Available transitions shown as clickable buttons, (3) Clicking transition animates state change with entry/exit action display, (4) History of visited states, (5) Guard condition evaluation shown.
acceptanceCriteria: Simulate button activates interactive mode highlighting initial state
Available transitions from current state shown as clickable buttons
Clicking transition animates: exit action → path highlight → entry action → new state
Guard conditions shown with pass/fail indicator
History panel shows sequence of visited states
Reset button returns to initial state

title: Add animated pattern construction walkthrough
description: When a pattern is loaded, offer 'Step by Step' mode that builds the pattern incrementally: (1) Start empty canvas, (2) Add first class with narration, (3) Add subsequent classes with explanations, (4) Draw relationships with descriptions, (5) Show complete pattern. Transforms static viewing into guided learning.
acceptanceCriteria: 'Step by Step' toggle appears when pattern loaded
Walkthrough starts with empty canvas
Each step adds one class or relationship with text explanation
Steps advance via Next/Previous or auto-play (3s intervals)
At least 3 patterns have full walkthroughs
User can exit to see full pattern anytime

title: Add deep-linkable URLs for patterns, problems, and demos
description: No way to link to a specific pattern/problem/demo. Add URL query params: ?lld=pattern:observer, ?lld=solid:srp, ?lld=problem:parking-lot, ?lld=sequence:oauth-login, ?lld=state:tcp-connection. Parse on load to auto-select. Update URL on selection via pushState.
acceptanceCriteria: URL param ?lld=pattern:{id} loads specified pattern
URL param ?lld=solid:{principle} loads SOLID demo
URL param ?lld=problem:{id} loads LLD problem
Selecting an item updates URL without page reload
Sharing URL loads exact same view
Invalid IDs gracefully fall back to empty state

title: Add export as PNG/SVG for diagrams
description: No diagram export exists. Add export dropdown to canvas toolbar: (1) Export as SVG (serialize SVG element), (2) Export as PNG (render to canvas, download), (3) Copy to clipboard as image. Works for all 3 canvas types.
acceptanceCriteria: Export dropdown in canvas title bar
SVG export produces valid .svg download
PNG export produces high-res .png download
Works for class diagrams, sequence diagrams, and state machines
Exported image includes title and legend

title: Replace module-level mutable ID counters with deterministic or UUID generation
description: Five files use module-level mutable counters: patterns.ts:14 (_relId), problems.ts:27 (_rid), solid-demos.ts:32 (_rid), code-to-diagram.ts:13 (_parseId), class-diagram-model.ts:19 (_counter). These accumulate across HMR. Replace with: deterministic content-based IDs for static data, crypto.randomUUID() for runtime IDs.
acceptanceCriteria: No module-level mutable counters remain
Static data uses deterministic IDs (e.g., 'singleton-rel-0')
Runtime IDs use crypto.randomUUID()
All tests pass
No ID collisions

title: Wire bidirectional-sync.ts for live code↔diagram synchronization
description: bidirectional-sync.ts (325 lines) exports SyncManager, syncDiagramToCode, syncCodeToDiagram — none used by any component. Currently CodeToDiagramPanel parses code one-way. Wire SyncManager to enable: editing code in CodeToDiagramPanel triggers live diagram updates; editing diagram triggers live code updates in GeneratedCodePanel.
acceptanceCriteria: Editing code in CodeToDiagramPanel updates diagram in real-time
Editing diagram (class name, attribute, etc.) updates code in GeneratedCodePanel
SyncManager diff detection (added/removed/modified) works correctly
No infinite sync loops between diagram↔code updates

title: Add Zustand store for LLD module state management
description: The LLD module uses 12 local useState hooks in useLLDModule() (lines 3207-3218) while other modules use Zustand stores. This prevents state persistence, cross-component sharing, and devtools inspection. Create useLLDStore with all current state plus actions. Enables future features like URL persistence and undo/redo.
acceptanceCriteria: Zustand store replaces all 12 useState hooks
All state transitions work identically
Store actions match current useCallback handlers
State accessible from any child without prop drilling
All existing functionality unchanged

title: Fix actor indicator overlap and state machine label width estimation
description: Two minor visual bugs: (1) At LLDModule.tsx:2067-2074, actor Unicode glyph at x+8 overlaps centered participant name for short names. Fix by offsetting name or placing indicator above. (2) At line 2807-2810, label background width estimated as label.length*5.6 which breaks for variable-width characters. Fix by using getBBox() measurement or consistent padding.
acceptanceCriteria: Actor indicator and participant name never overlap regardless of name length
State machine transition labels fully covered by background rect
Background has consistent padding around text for all label lengths
